https://openalex.org/W4392906240.kf1: The online peer-led intervention significantly improved wellbeing, social connectedness, coping skills, sense of purpose, self-esteem, and self-compassion (medium-large effects) at 1 and 2 weeks.

https://openalex.org/W4417423092.kf1: The 3C program increased resilience (d=0.89 at 6 months) and lowered anxiety and PTSD across follow-ups, but depression and prosociality gains attenuated by 9 months without boosters.

https://openalex.org/W4415970737.kf1: Positive parental beliefs about violence reduced stimulating activities (lowering child effortful control/positive affect), and parental distress increased violent punishment (raising negative affectivity).

https://openalex.org/W4413375303.kf1: In late childhood, inconsistent reporting of self-injurious thoughts/behaviors over time was the norm (67-80%), associated with lower clinical severity, younger age, and lower neurocognitive performance.
